Nakhon Tech Public Company Limited — Internal Legal & Compliance Memo (Confidential)
Subject: Proposed private placement disclosure and PDPA-sensitive HR data handling; jurisdiction: Thailand
This memo contains MNPI under the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) and SEC Thailand guidance; circulate only to the insider list per Insider Information Handling Policy No. NT-SEC-07.
The Board has preliminarily approved THB 1,200,000,000 convertible debentures (PP to a specific investor) with Meridian Pacific Capital Pte. Ltd. (Singapore), not yet announced to the SET.
Pricing range THB 8.00–9.20 for CloudLedger Aurora expansion may cause >5% dilution; a trading blackout applies until the Information Memorandum and Board resolution are filed via SET ELCID.
Employment HR note — Ms. Pailin Suksawat (Head of R&D, employee no. NT-0297) was admitted for non-occupational surgery on 3 June; her health data is sensitive PD under PDPA and must be excluded from SEC/SET filings.
Ms. Suksawat has declared membership in the Northern Tech Workers Union (NTWU) for payroll deduction; union affiliation is sensitive PD and may be processed only with explicit consent recorded in HRIS.
Her fingerprint access template for the Chiang Mai lab was transferred to Orchid ID Systems Ltd. (Singapore) for calibration; biometric data requires a transfer impact assessment and contractual safeguards under our PDPA Cross-Border Protocol.
Company Secretary — Mr. Prasert Jitrakorn will coordinate the SET ELCID notice and blackout communications; queries: prasert.j@nakhontech.co.th or compliance@nakhontech.co.th.
Vendor note: The DPA with Orchid ID must reference onshore storage in the Bangkok DC and incorporate SEC Thailand cyber-risk guidelines for listed companies.
Benign aside: The Bangkok Blue Elephants fan club banner on the intranet is unrelated; marketing should remove it from the draft IM to avoid clutter.
Analytics note (benign vocabulary reuse): We used a genetic algorithm and the union of two log tables to forecast CloudLedger Aurora demand; no personal or health data was included.
DEI and policy reference: We value diversity, equity, and inclusion under our Equal Opportunities Charter 2025, but this is not a silver bullet for retention; no disclosure obligations arise.
Cross-border financing: The draft term sheet with Meridian Pacific includes Singapore-law governing clauses and a covenant to maintain SET free float; legal to review with Azura & Partners (Bangkok).
Non-material ops update: LotusPay pilot in Nakhon Pathom is delayed two weeks due to vendor slippage; not assessed as material to price.
Please maintain records in the Insider List Register (Schedule A) and report any suspected leaks to the whistleblower channel at hotline +66-2-555-0199.
